title: Békéscsaba, Békés — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Békéscsaba, Békés: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Békéscsaba is a city in Békés with a population of 58,002. A city on the Great Plain in southeastern Hungary, known for its Slovak minority heritage, the Csaba Sausage Festival, and agricultural traditions.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
